summary: Transition Diamond Reveal component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的菱形展开转场组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/transition-diamond-reveal/src/TransitionDiamondReveal.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TransitionDiamondReveal` and `transitionDiamondRevealDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Transition Diamond Reveal Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/transition-diamond-reveal to my project. Preserve the exported TransitionDiamondRevealProps API and register the TransitionDiamondReveal composition with the default props.
